name: Sapphire PULSE RX 7700 XT 12GB GDDR6 Graphic Card
description: Sapphire PULSE RX 7700 XT 12GB GDDR6 Graphic Card What is Sapphire PULSE RX 7700 XT 12GB GDDR6 Graphic Card price in Pakistan? Sapphire PULSE RX 7700 XT 12GB GDDR6 Graphic Card price in Pakistan is Rs.142,500. It features 3456 stream processors with boost clock up to 2544 MHz and 12GB GDDR6 memory on a 192-bit interface for strong 1440p gaming performance. Built on AMD RDNA™ 3 architecture with 48MB Infinity Cache and PCIe 4.0 support, it offers ray tracing, AI accelerators, and Dual-X cooling.
